programs.title: The Protectors
programs.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Caroline plans revenge on behalf of a friend who has been swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by a trickster.

programs.title: Magnum, P.I.
programs.desc: .. A Broad: When Robin is sued by a con man who makes a tidy income out of taking legal action over fake accidents, the crook is murdered.

programs.title: Kojak
programs.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the case of a surgeon who is in desperate need of money to pay off enormous gambling debts and has now turned to lawbreaking.

programs.title: The Saint
programs.desc: More action and intrigue with suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. A nightclub owner tricked into believing that The Saint is trying to kill him arranges his murder.

programs.title: Boon
programs.desc: Classic drama. Ken insists on taking the battle to the enemy when The Grand becomes the latest target of a local protection racket who vandalise the business.
